requirement_topic.en: EWA Grid-Connection Requirements for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: EWA关于充电设备的并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: EWA關於充電設備的併網要求

summary.en: EV chargers connected to EWA's electricity distribution network in Bahrain require EWA grid-connection approval under the November 2025 MEWA EV charging framework. EWA is empowered to set technical requirements, approve connection agreements, and maintain a national register of EV charging equipment. Technical grid requirements include voltage tolerance (±6% from rated voltage at the point of connection), power quality, and protection coordination. Bahrain's grid operates at 50 Hz / 400 V (three-phase) / 230 V (single-phase). Commercial and public fast-charging stations require formal EWA connection approval before commissioning.
summary.zh: 接入EWA巴林配电网的充电设备，须根据2025年11月MEWA充电框架取得EWA并网批准。EWA获授权制定技术要求、审批接入协议并维护全国充电设备登记册。技术并网要求包括电压容差（并网点电压偏离额定值±6%以内）、电能质量和保护配合。巴林电网采用50Hz / 400V（三相）/ 230V（单相）。商用和公共快充站在调试前须取得EWA正式并网批准。
summary.zht: 接入EWA巴林配電網的充電設備，須根據2025年11月MEWA充電框架取得EWA併網批准。EWA獲授權制定技術要求、審批接入協議並維護全國充電設備登記冊。技術併網要求包括電壓容差（併網點電壓偏離額定值±6%以內）、電能質量和保護配合。巴林電網採用50Hz / 400V（三相）/ 230V（單相）。商用和公共快充站在調試前須取得EWA正式併網批准。

standards_or_laws: Bahrain MEWA EV charging regulatory framework (November 2025)
IEC 61851-21-2:2021 (EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems)

summary.en: In China, EV chargers connected to the grid are subject to utility grid-connection requirements administered by State Grid Corporation (SGCC) or China Southern Power Grid (CSG), and must comply with GB/T 18487.1-2023 and related grid-interaction standards. China domestic grid-connection approvals are not recognised in Bahrain.
summary.zh: 在中国，接入电网的充电设备须符合国家电网公司（SGCC）或南方电网公司（CSG）管理的并网要求，并须满足GB/T 18487.1-2023和相关并网交互标准。中国国内并网批准在巴林不被认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，接入電網的充電設備須符合國家電網公司（SGCC）或南方電網公司（CSG）管理的併網要求，並須滿足GB/T 18487.1-2023和相關併網交互標準。中國國內併網批准在巴林不被認可。

standards_or_laws: SGCC / CSG EV charger grid-connection technical requirements

gap.en: EV charger electrical systems must be configured for Bahrain's 50 Hz / 400 V / 230 V grid. Obtain EWA grid-connection approval before commissioning any commercial or public EV charging station. China domestic grid approval has no standing with EWA. Engage an EWA-approved contractor for installation and connection.
gap.zh: 充电设备电气系统须针对巴林50Hz / 400V / 230V电网进行配置。在调试任何商用或公共充电站前取得EWA并网批准。中国国内并网批准对EWA不具效力。聘用EWA认可承包商进行安装和接入。
gap.zht: 充電設備電氣系統須針對巴林50Hz / 400V / 230V電網進行配置。在調試任何商用或公共充電站前取得EWA併網批准。中國國內併網批准對EWA不具效力。聘用EWA認可承包商進行安裝和接入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for commercial and public EV chargers connected to EWA's distribution network; EWA grid-connection approval required under the 2025 MEWA framework
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic EV charger grid connection under SGCC / CSG technical requirements; separate from EWA

source.publisher: Electricity and Water Authority (EWA), Kingdom of Bahrain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EWA grid-connection approval is mandatory for commercial and public EV chargers in Bahrain under the 2025 MEWA framework. Configure equipment for 50 Hz / 400 V / 230 V and engage an EWA-approved contractor before commissioning. China domestic grid approval has no standing with EWA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在2025年MEWA框架下，EWA并网批准是巴林商用和公共充电设备的强制要求。设备须针对50Hz / 400V / 230V配置，并在调试前聘用EWA认可承包商。中国国内并网批准对EWA不具效力。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在2025年MEWA框架下，EWA併網批准是巴林商用和公共充電設備的強制要求。設備須針對50Hz / 400V / 230V配置，並在調試前聘用EWA認可承包商。中國國內併網批准對EWA不具效力。
